events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessed the hazard and wrote the findings to `/app/answer.json`.

Summary: an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside is an automatic **fail** — **critical** risk, imminent cave-in hazard under OSHA 1926.652(a)(1). Required immediate actions: stop work, remove workers, competent-person soil evaluation, install a protective system (shoring/shielding/sloping-benching), verify egress and spoil setback, then re-inspect before allowing re-entry.
